example: Patient medical records are strictly confidential and cannot be shared without permission.
writing_note: 描述法律、醫療或商業上不對外公開的敏感資訊。

example: The laboratory has been redesigned with a more efficient configuration of equipment.
writing_note: 描述電腦系統設定或空間物品的排列方式。

example: The illness confined him to his bed for several weeks.
writing_note: 描述在空間或範圍內的「強制限制」。常用結構：be confined to...

example: Can you please call the hotel to confirm our reservation?
writing_note: 描述確認消息的真偽或正式批准一項任命。

example: The story explores the conflict between traditional values and modern life.
writing_note: 描述人際衝突、國際戰爭或價值觀的矛盾。

example: Many teenagers feel pressured to conform to the expectations of their peers.
writing_note: 描述服從社會習俗或規定。常用結構：Conform to rules/standards。

example: We must confront the problem of plastic pollution before it"s too late.
writing_note: 比 face 更具「勇於挑戰、正面解決」的積極感。

example: There was some confusion regarding the new schedule, so the meeting was delayed.
writing_note: 描述心理上的迷惘或現場局勢的失控。

example: The city is famous for its heavy traffic congestion during the rush hour.
writing_note: 常用於形容「交通擁堵 (traffic congestion)」或「鼻塞 (nasal congestion)」。

example: The two companies worked in conjunction with each other to develop the new app.
writing_note: 常用片語：In conjunction with... (與...共同/結合)。

example: She finally managed to conquer her fear of spiders after several therapy sessions.
writing_note: 除了征服土地，也常用於「克服恐懼、惡習或困難」。

example: The suspect finally confessed to the crime because his conscience was bothering him.
writing_note: 描述內心的是非判斷感（a clear conscience 問心無愧）。

example: A conscientious student always double-checks their work before submitting it.
writing_note: 形容一個人對工作或學習極其細心且負責，是 15 級分作文常用正面詞。

chinese: 有意識的；察覺到的；神志清醒的
example: She was conscious of the fact that everyone was looking at her.
writing_note: 常用結構：Be conscious of...。也可指「刻意的行為 (a conscious effort)」。

example: The team won five consecutive matches, breaking the school record.
writing_note: 描述時間或順序無間斷地發生（for three consecutive days）。

example: There is a growing consensus among scientists that urgent action is needed to stop global warming.
writing_note: 描述團體內達成的共同決議（reach a consensus on...）。

example: Children under the age of 18 need parental consent to go on the field trip.
writing_note: 比 agreement 正式，常用於法律、醫療或隱私政策的許可。

example: Every action has a consequence, so think carefully before you make a decision.
writing_note: 通常指「負面或重大」的後果。常用片語：As a consequence (結果)。

chinese: 保守的；守舊的；保守主義者
example: The older generation tends to have more conservative views on marriage and family.
writing_note: 形容觀念不願輕易變更，或對數據的「保守估計 (a conservative estimate)」。

chinese: 相當大的；相當多的；值得考慮的
example: The new project has required a considerable amount of time and resources.
writing_note: 15 級分作文用來描述數量「多到不可忽視」的常用詞。

chinese: 始終如一的；前後一致的
example: If you want to improve your skills, you need to be consistent in your practice.
writing_note: 形容表現穩定或言行一致（be consistent with...）。

example: The company decided to consolidate its multiple offices into one central building.
writing_note: 描述強化權力、整合資源或合併零散的部分。

example: The billboard was placed in a conspicuous position near the highway exit.
writing_note: 形容因為太明顯而讓人無法忽視。

chinese: 持續不斷的；永恆的；常數
example: He suffers from constant headaches due to excessive stress and lack of sleep.
writing_note: 形容情況不曾間斷（constant complaints）或事物保持不變。

example: Nitrogen is the main constituent of the Earth"s atmosphere.
writing_note: 在科學或社會分析主題中，比 part 更具專業感。

example: Testing on animals can sometimes constitute a violation of ethical standards.
writing_note: 常用於法律或學術描述，「某行為等同於...」或「某部分組成整體」。

example: Due to time constraints, we were unable to finish the entire presentation.
writing_note: 常用複數 constraints。描述預算、時間或法律帶來的客觀限制。

example: The engineer worked hard to construct a bridge that could withstand heavy winds.
writing_note: 除了建築物，也可用於「構建理論 (construct a theory)」或「建構論點」。

example: If you are unsure about the symptoms, you should consult a doctor immediately.
writing_note: 描述向專家尋求建議，或查字典/地圖 (consult a dictionary)。

example: This new air conditioner consumes much less energy than the old model.
writing_note: 除了吃喝，常用於描述能源消耗或被熱情、悲傷所「淹沒」。

example: Companies need to be honest about their products to build trust with consumers.
writing_note: 經濟、商業議題核心詞（consumer rights 消費者權益）。

example: Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions regarding the application.
writing_note: 常用結構：Stay in contact with someone (與某人保持聯繫)。

chinese: （疾病）傳染性的；（情緒）有感染力的
example: Laughter is often contagious; if one person starts, everyone else follows.
writing_note: 常用於醫學。比喻用法指情緒、熱情或哈欠極具感染力。

example: Chemical waste from the factory has contaminated the local water supply.
writing_note: 比 pollute 專業，常用於描述食品、水源或證據被「弄髒、破壞性影響」。

example: She sat by the river, contemplating the future of her career.
writing_note: 描述「長時間且深度的思考」，高階寫作好字。

example: The museum features a collection of contemporary art from local artists.
writing_note: 形容現代的風格或與某人身處同一時代（Shakespeare and his contemporaries）。

example: He showed a complete contempt for the rules of the game and was eventually disqualified.
writing_note: 描述對某人或規則極度的反感與瞧不起（contempt for authority）。

example: Several teams are contending for the championship this year.
writing_note: 常用於「競爭 (contend for)」或在辯論中「主張某觀點為真 (contend that)」。

example: After a long day of hard work, he felt a deep sense of contentment.
writing_note: 描述一種平和且持久的滿足感，比 happiness 更有深度。

example: It is important to understand the historical context in which the novel was written.
writing_note: 強調事件發生的環境或言論的背景資訊（in the context of...）。

example: The witness"s latest statement seems to contradict the evidence found at the scene.
writing_note: 描述兩件事互不相容或言行不一。

example: Contrary to popular belief, not all spiders are dangerous to humans.
writing_note: 常用片語：On the contrary (恰恰相反) 或 Contrary to... (與...相反)。

example: The bright red flowers stood out in sharp contrast to the grey wall.
writing_note: 作文萬用詞。常用片語：In contrast to/with... (相比之下)。

example: We should all contribute our efforts to making the world a better place.
writing_note: 常用結構：Contribute to...。描述導致某種結果的原因之一（通常是正面）。

example: The government"s plan to build a new airport has become a highly controversial issue.
writing_note: 論說文起手式常用字，引導出存在分歧的主題。

example: Online shopping is very convenient for people who have busy work schedules.
writing_note: 形容節省時間或免除麻煩。注意其名詞 Convenience (便利)。

chinese: 傳統的；常規的；墨守成規的
example: While conventional medicine is effective, some people prefer natural remedies.
writing_note: 常用於對比「新舊方法」或「主流與非主流」。

example: The two paths converge at the top of the hill, offering a panoramic view.
writing_note: 描述人流匯聚或不同意見逐漸變得一致。

example: The author uses simple language to convey complex emotions to the reader.
writing_note: 描述透過言語、藝術或行為將訊息傳遞給他人。

example: I tried to convince him to join the club, but he was too busy with his studies.
writing_note: 常用結構：Convince someone of something 或 be convinced that... (確信)。

example: To complete the project on time, everyone in the group must cooperate with each other.
writing_note: 描述雙方共同努力達成目標（cooperation 合作）。

example: The project manager is responsible for coordinating the activities of all team members.
writing_note: 描述使不同部分、不同的人有效配合運作。

example: Many teenagers find it difficult to cope with the pressure of the national exams.
writing_note: 常用結構：Cope with...。描述在壓力或困難下設法撐過去或解決問題。

example: Despite their political differences, the two leaders maintained a cordial relationship.
writing_note: 形容人際互動或外交場合中「客氣且友善」的質感。

example: The company has a very strong corporate culture that values teamwork and innovation.
writing_note: 描述與大企業或集體相關的事務（corporate social responsibility 企業社會責任）。

example: Studies show that a healthy diet is often correlated with a longer life expectancy.
writing_note: 描述兩組數據、兩件事物之間存在關聯性。

example: Power tends to corrupt, and absolute power corrupts absolutely.
writing_note: 常用於批評政府、制度或人格的墮落。

chinese: 理事會；委員會；地方議會
example: The local council has approved the plans for a new public library.
writing_note: 描述負責特定事務或地區管理的官方團體。

example: The counselor provided expert advice to help the student choose the right career path.
writing_note: 除了建議，也指提供心理或專業諮詢的行為。

example: The police seized thousands of counterfeit handbags during the raid on the warehouse.
writing_note: 比 fake 更正式，常用於法律、貨幣或名牌仿冒議題。

example: Staying up all night to study can be counterproductive as it leads to exhaustion and poor focus.
writing_note: 描述某種做法不但沒達成目標，反而帶來負面效果。

example: Common courtesy requires that you say "thank you" when someone helps you.
writing_note: 指社會生活中應有的禮儀與對他人的尊重。

chinese: 新聞報導；覆蓋範圍；保險範圍
example: The live coverage of the Olympic Games reached millions of viewers worldwide.
writing_note: 描述媒體對事件的報導，或保險、訊號的涵蓋程度。

chinese: 有創造力的；啟發想像力的
example: Art classes help children develop their creative thinking and problem-solving skills.
writing_note: 形容具備新穎想法或藝術才華的能力。

example: You need to show your credentials before you can enter the restricted area.
writing_note: 描述證明個人能力或身分的各種證明文件。

example: The police are looking for a credible witness who saw the entire accident.
writing_note: 形容證據、新聞來源或人值得信任。

example: He was given full credit for the success of the environmental campaign.
writing_note: 常用結構：Give credit to someone (歸功於某人) 或 Take credit for (攬功)。

example: The company welcomes all employees, regardless of their race, gender, or creed.
writing_note: 描述個人或團體所信奉的根本準則，比 belief 正式。

example: Academic performance is not the only criterion used for university admission.
writing_note: 單數形為 criterion，複數形為 criteria。這是學測常考的難點。

chinese: 關鍵的；批評的；批判性的；嚴重的
example: Critical thinking is an essential skill that students need to develop for their future careers.
writing_note: 常用於描述「關鍵時刻 (critical moment)」或「批判性思考 (critical thinking)」。

example: The government was criticized for its slow response to the natural disaster.
writing_note: 描述對某事、某人表示不滿或指出缺點。

example: Parental support plays a crucial role in a child"s emotional and psychological development.
writing_note: 比 important 強烈，帶有「成敗關鍵」的意味。

example: The early tools made by ancient humans were very crude and primitive.
writing_note: 可形容「原油 (crude oil)」或「粗魯、沒教養的言語」。

example: Testing cosmetics on animals is considered by many to be a cruel practice.
writing_note: 形容使人感到痛苦且缺乏同情心的行為。

example: They decided to take a luxury cruise around the Mediterranean for their honeymoon.
writing_note: 描述放鬆、緩慢的航行或駕駛過程。

example: The ancient walls began to crumble after centuries of exposure to the elements.
writing_note: 除了物體碎裂，也常用於「信心或制度的崩潰」。

example: Reading helps children cultivate their imagination and critical thinking skills.
writing_note: 常用於「養成習慣 (cultivate a habit)」或「建立良好形象」。

example: It is important to respect the cultural differences of people from around the world.
writing_note: 討論全球化、傳統或社會價值時的核心形容詞。

example: The cumulative effect of years of smoking can lead to serious health problems.
writing_note: 描述隨著時間推移而不斷增加、疊加的影響。

example: The fox is often used in stories as a symbol of a cunning and clever character.
writing_note: 帶有負面「欺騙、耍小聰明」的意味。

example: The government is taking new measures to curb the rising rate of unemployment.
writing_note: 描述「阻止或控制負面趨勢」的高階動詞。

example: Children have an innate curiosity about the world that helps them learn and grow.
writing_note: 常用結構：Satisfy one"s curiosity (滿足好奇心)。

example: The dollar is the most widely used currency in international trade and finance.
writing_note: 描述金錢。比喻用法指「觀點或觀念的流行度（gain currency）」。

example: The school is planning to add computer coding to its primary school curriculum.
writing_note: 教育議題必備字。複數形為 curricula。

example: Due to the budget crisis, the company had to curtail its spending on research.
writing_note: 正式用詞，通常描述因必要而「砍掉」部分支出或活動。

chinese: 習慣的；慣常的；合乎習俗的
example: In some cultures, it is customary to remove your shoes before entering a home.
writing_note: 描述基於傳統或長久習慣而「通常會這樣做」的事。

chinese: 憤世嫉俗的；懷疑人性自私的
example: Many young people have become cynical about the promises made by politicians.
writing_note: 描述對社會現狀、他人動機抱持不信任且悲觀的負面態度。

chinese: 使眼花繚亂；使讚嘆；耀眼的光
example: The athlete dazzled the audience with his incredible speed and agility.
writing_note: 除了強光刺眼，也常用於「才華驚豔全場」。

example: The cobra is one of the most deadly snakes in the world due to its toxic venom.
writing_note: 形容具備殺傷力。也可用於描述極度無聊 (deadly boring)。

chinese: 震耳欲聾的；極大的（反響）
example: There was a deafening silence in the room after the controversial announcement.
writing_note: 形容聲音極大，也可用於「如雷的掌聲 (deafening applause)」。

example: The politicians held a televised debate to discuss the future of the nation"s economy.
writing_note: 描述針對特定議題、正反兩方有組織的討論。

example: The company has grown significantly over the past decade, opening offices in ten countries.
writing_note: 描述時間跨度。常用片語：For decades (數十年來)。

example: You should not try to deceive people by telling lies or hiding the truth.
writing_note: 描述故意使人產生錯誤認知。注意其名詞 Deception。

example: Everyone deserves a decent place to live and enough food to eat.
writing_note: 形容品質達到平均水準以上，或人的行為符合道德規範。

example: The general"s quick and decisive action saved the lives of many soldiers.
writing_note: 形容一個人做事不猶豫，或是某件事決定了最終結果。

example: The local population has begun to decline as young people move to bigger cities.
writing_note: 描述數據下滑、健康/勢力衰退，或禮貌地拒絕邀請。

example: The scientist decided to dedicate his life to finding a cure for the rare disease.
writing_note: 常用被動結構：Be dedicated to + N/V-ing。形容投入大量時間與心力。

example: From the footprints in the snow, the detective deduced that the suspect had fled on foot.
writing_note: 描述根據既有事實進行邏輯推理。注意其名詞 Deduction。

example: The company had to recall thousands of cars due to a major safety defect in the engine.
writing_note: 名詞指產品或系統的瑕疵；動詞指背棄國家或理想投向敵方。

example: A vitamin deficiency can lead to a variety of health problems, such as fatigue.
writing_note: 常用於醫學或技術描述「某種必要元素未達標」。

example: The government is struggling to reduce the budget deficit by cutting public spending.
writing_note: 經濟議題核心詞，特別指支出超過收入的金額。

example: It is difficult to define the word "happiness" because it means different things to everyone.
writing_note: 論說文起手式，用來界定討論的範圍或概念。

example: The police need definite proof before they can make an arrest in the case.
writing_note: 形容毫不含糊、已經確定的狀態。

chinese: 違抗；挑戰；使成為不可能
example: The brave soldier was willing to defy orders to save the lives of his comrades.
writing_note: 描述公然反抗權威，或事物奇特到「讓人無法解釋 (defy description)」。

example: Pollution can significantly degrade the quality of the soil and water in the region.
writing_note: 描述環境品質惡化或使人的尊嚴受損。

chinese: 故意的；深思熟慮的；商議
example: I believe his decision to resign was a deliberate move to focus on his family.
writing_note: 形容經過計畫而非偶然的行為。動詞指長時間的仔細考慮。

example: The diplomat handled the delicate situation with great skill and patience.
writing_note: 可形容物品易碎，也常用於描述「棘手且需要小心處理的」局勢。

chinese: 要求高的；費力的；苛求的
example: Being a surgeon is a very demanding job that requires long hours and intense focus.
writing_note: 形容工作、學習或人非常難應付，需要付出極大心力。

example: The transition to democracy can be a slow and difficult process for some countries.
writing_note: 公民社會議題核心詞。注意形容詞 Democratic。

example: The old factory was demolished to make way for a new residential complex.
writing_note: 除了建築物，也可用於形容在辯論中「徹底駁倒」對方的觀點。

example: The scientist conducted an experiment to demonstrate the law of gravity.
writing_note: 描述透過行動或證據來「展現事實」，或參加街頭抗爭。

example: The leader of the opposition was quick to denounce the government"s new tax policy.
writing_note: 正式且公開地表達反對與不滿。

chinese: 稠密的；笨拙的；（文字）難懂的
example: The rescue team had a hard time finding the missing hiker in the dense forest.
writing_note: 描述森林、人口或煙霧的密度。也可用於指文字內容太紮實難讀。

example: The train is scheduled to depart from platform three at exactly noon.
writing_note: 正式的出發。常用片語：Depart from... (背離習慣/主題)。

example: A dependable car is essential for someone who has to commute a long distance every day.
writing_note: 形容人或產品始終如一地表現良好。

example: The movie depicts the life of a young immigrant struggling to survive in New York.
writing_note: 看圖作文第一段必備字：The picture depicts...

example: If we continue to use natural resources at this rate, we will eventually deplete them.
writing_note: 描述資源（如金錢、體力、能源）被大量消耗殆盡。

example: Many environmental groups deplore the destruction of the rainforest.
writing_note: 表達對某種惡劣現狀的強烈不滿與痛心。

example: You need to pay a security deposit before you can move into the apartment.
writing_note: 描述在銀行存錢、租房押金或地質上的沉積。

example: Excessive noise at night can deprive people of the sleep they need to function.
writing_note: 常用結構：Deprive someone of something。描述失去權利或必需品。

chinese: 起源於；衍生；得到（樂趣等）
example: Many words in the English language are derived from Latin or Greek roots.
writing_note: 常用結構：Be derived from... 或 Derive pleasure from...。

example: The airplane began to descend as it approached the airport for landing.
writing_note: 物理上的向下移動，或形容情況墮落（descend into chaos）。

example: Can you describe the person you saw leaving the building yesterday?
writing_note: 作文萬用動詞。注意其名詞 Description。

example: Everyone who works hard deserves a chance to achieve their goals.
writing_note: 描述某人因為其行為或性質而「配得上」某種待遇。

example: This area has been designated as a non-smoking zone by the local council.
writing_note: 描述正式的任命或將某空間劃定為特定用途。

example: The family was in desperate need of food and clean water after the flood.
writing_note: 形容情況極其嚴峻、令人抓狂（in desperate need of...）。

example: Please detach the coupon and present it to the cashier to get a discount.
writing_note: 除了物體分離，也可形容情感上的「冷淡、超然 (detached attitude)」。

example: The new security system is sensitive enough to detect even the smallest movements.
writing_note: 常用於科學發現、犯罪偵查或細微變化的察覺。

example: The high fines are intended to deter people from speeding on the highway.
writing_note: 描述透過困難或懲罰來「阻止某人做某事」。常用結構：Deter someone from doing something。

example: If the weather continues to deteriorate, the outdoor event will have to be canceled.
writing_note: 15 級分作文常用來替換 worsen，形容健康、局勢、氣候或物品品質變糟。

example: It takes a lot of hard work and determination to succeed in such a competitive field.
writing_note: 作文勵志主題核心詞，強調不輕言放棄的特質。

example: Excessive use of social media can have a detrimental effect on teenagers" mental health.
writing_note: 替換 harmful 的高階形容詞。常用結構：Be detrimental to...。

example: The city was devastated by a massive earthquake that left thousands homeless.
writing_note: 除了物理破壞，也常用於描述內心遭受的「極度打擊」。

example: We should not deviate from the original plan unless it is absolutely necessary.
writing_note: 描述脫離常軌、計畫或預期。常用結構：Deviate from...。

example: She decided to devote her career to protecting endangered species in the rainforest.
writing_note: 常用被動結構：Be devoted to + N/V-ing。

example: Early diagnosis of the disease is crucial for increasing the chances of recovery.
writing_note: 除了醫學診斷，也可指對社會或公司問題的根源判斷。複數形為 diagnoses。

example: It is sometimes difficult to differentiate between genuine and counterfeit products.
writing_note: 描述「辨別細微差異」的能力（differentiate A from B）。

chinese: 傳播；擴散；漫長的；不簡練的
example: Social media allows information and ideas to diffuse rapidly around the world.
writing_note: 描述光線、氣味或觀念、權力的分散與傳播。

example: Everyone should be treated with dignity and respect, regardless of their background.
writing_note: 討論人權、教育或照護議題時的核心詞彙。

example: With persistence and diligence, you can achieve your goals and dreams.
writing_note: 比 hard work 高級，描述持之以恆且認真的工作態度。

example: Your lack of experience does not diminish your potential for success in this role.
writing_note: 描述影響力、熱情或重要性逐漸降低。

chinese: 外交；外交手腕；處事圓滑
example: International problems should be solved through diplomacy rather than force.
writing_note: 描述國家間的交涉，或在人際關係中巧妙處理衝突的能力。

example: Please discard your used masks in the designated bins to prevent the spread of germs.
writing_note: 描述丟棄廢物，或捨棄舊觀念、計畫。

example: It was difficult to discern any difference between the two counterfeit bills.
writing_note: 強調透過觀察力「看出細微的差別或真相」。

chinese: 排放；釋放；履行（義務）；解雇；出院
example: The factory was fined for discharging toxic waste into the nearby river.
writing_note: 環境議題常用於「排放廢氣/水」。也指病人出院或士兵退伍。

example: Developing self-discipline is essential for achieving long-term goals and success.
writing_note: 作文常考主題，強調自我約束的力量（self-discipline）。

example: The company is required by law to disclose its financial records to the public.
writing_note: 描述公開原本保密的資訊，如秘密、財報或事實。

example: There is a wide discrepancy between the rich and the poor in many modern cities.
writing_note: 描述數據不符、言行矛盾或貧富「落差」。

example: It is illegal to discriminate against employees based on their race, gender, or religion.
writing_note: 常用結構：Discriminate against someone (歧視某人)。

example: She tried to disguise her nervousness by talking and laughing loudly.
writing_note: 看圖作文常用字。片語：a blessing in disguise (塞翁失馬)。

example: The manager dismissed the rumors about layoffs, saying they were completely false.
writing_note: 論說文中表示「不考慮、否定某個想法」的動詞。

example: Eating disorders are serious health conditions that require professional help.
writing_note: 除了社會混亂，也用於描述身心「失調 (eating/mental disorder)」。

chinese: 驅散；消除（疑慮、恐懼、傳聞）
example: The latest scientific evidence helped to dispel the myths about the new vaccine.
writing_note: 常用於 dispel rumors/fears/doubts (消除傳聞/恐懼/疑慮)。

example: The police used tear gas to disperse the angry crowd outside the parliament.
writing_note: 描述人群散開、種子傳播或光線色散。

example: The museum displays a collection of authentic artifacts from ancient Rome.
writing_note: 可指博物館展覽，也指展現出某種行為或情感。

chinese: 一次性使用的；可自由支配的（錢）
example: Disposable plastic products are a major contributor to global pollution.
writing_note: 環境議題核心詞。也用於形容「可支配收入 (disposable income)」。

example: The two countries are currently involved in a long-standing territorial dispute.
writing_note: 描述正式的、長期的爭端或對某個事實的真實性提出懷疑。

example: He was criticized for his total disregard of the safety warnings on the equipment.
writing_note: 比 ignore 語氣更重，帶有「明知卻故意不理會」的負面意涵。

example: The sudden protests disrupted the city"s public transportation system for several days.
writing_note: 常用於描述「交通、通訊、秩序或課程被突發事件打斷」。

chinese: 溶解；解散（議會、婚姻）；消失
example: Sugar will dissolve quickly when you stir it into a hot cup of tea.
writing_note: 物理上的溶解，或法律上正式「解除」某種關係或組織。

example: She has always been very distant with her colleagues, rarely joining in social activities.
writing_note: 描述空間的距離，也常用於描述人際關係的「隔閡感」。

chinese: 截然不同的；明顯的；清晰的
example: There are three distinct types of birds that live in this particular forest.
writing_note: 強調兩者之間有「明確的差別」，常用於分類與分析。

example: He won several awards for his academic distinction throughout his university years.
writing_note: 常用片語：Make a distinction between (區分...)。也指極高的成就。

example: It is difficult to distinguish between the identical twins unless they speak.
writing_note: 常用結構：Distinguish A from B 或 Distinguish between A and B。

example: The media was accused of trying to distort the facts to suit its own agenda.
writing_note: 描述事實被「惡意歪曲」，或聲音、影像的失真。

example: It is easy to get distracted by social media when you are trying to study.
writing_note: 描述注意力被外在因素（如噪音、手機）拉走。

example: The charity organization distributed food and clothes to the flood victims.
writing_note: 描述將資源發送給一群人，或事物廣泛分佈在某區域。

example: The city has a diverse population with people from all over the world.
writing_note: 比 various 更正式，強調「性質、文化或種類」上的豐富度。

chinese: 使轉向；轉移（注意力、資金）；消遣
example: The police diverted the traffic to another road because of the serious accident.
writing_note: 描述改變原定的路線、用途或注意力的方向。

example: The teacher divided the class into several small groups for the discussion.
writing_note: 描述物理上的切割，或指社會、政治上的「分歧 (digital divide)」。

chinese: 神聖的；非凡的；預言；猜測
example: Many ancient civilizations believed that their kings had a divine right to rule.
writing_note: 形容與神有關的，或用來稱讚某物美得不可方物。

example: He decided to divorce himself from the controversial project after several scandals.
writing_note: 除了婚姻，也常用於「使兩者脫鉤、分離」。

example: The historian spent years documenting the daily lives of factory workers in the 19th century.
writing_note: 動詞指透過文字、影像來「詳細紀錄」事實。

chinese: 佔優勢的；支配的；顯性的
example: English has become the dominant language in international business and science.
writing_note: 描述在某領域中擁有最強大力量或最普遍的地位。

example: Many people choose to donate a portion of their income to charity every year.
writing_note: 描述無私地給予金錢、器官、血液或物品以幫助他人。

example: The volcano has been dormant for hundreds of years and is now a popular tourist site.
writing_note: 除了形容火山，也可形容「才華、疾病或種子」處於不活動狀態。

chinese: 懷疑的；可疑的；不明確的
example: It is doubtful whether the new project will be completed on schedule.
writing_note: 常用結構：It is doubtful that/whether...。描述對某事不抱信心。

example: We need to take drastic measures to curb the rising rate of carbon emissions.
writing_note: 常用於形容採取「果斷且強力的行動 (drastic measures)」。

example: Most students dread the thought of having to give a presentation in front of the class.
writing_note: 描述一種預期到不好的事即將發生而產生的「深沉恐懼」。

example: The company"s claims about its environmental record are highly dubious.
writing_note: 形容某事物值得懷疑，或對其真實性持保留態度。

example: Investing in durable materials will save you money in the long run.
writing_note: 描述產品品質良好、不易損壞，或關係長久穩定。

example: It is not healthy to dwell on your past mistakes; you should focus on the future.
writing_note: 常用結構：Dwell on... (糾結於/老話重提)。

chinese: 充滿活力的；動態的；動力
example: The tech industry is a dynamic field that is constantly changing and evolving.
writing_note: 形容一個人積極有活力，或一個環境充滿變化。

example: The young girl was eager to show her parents the beautiful painting she had made.
writing_note: 常用結構：Be eager to + V 或 Be eager for + N。

example: He made an earnest effort to apologize for his mistakes and make things right.
writing_note: 形容態度極其嚴肅、真誠且不敷衍。

chinese: 古古怪怪的；不尋常的；怪人
example: The eccentric professor was known for his strange habits and unique teaching style.
writing_note: 形容人的行為獨特且有點「怪」，但通常不一定帶有貶義。

example: His performance was so brilliant that it eclipsed all the other actors on stage.
writing_note: 除了天文現象，常用於比喻「某人的成就讓其他人顯得平庸」。

example: The oil spill has caused severe ecological damage to the coastline and marine life.
writing_note: 討論自然保護、平衡與環境議題的核心詞彙。

example: The country is facing a severe economic crisis due to high inflation and unemployment.
writing_note: 注意區分 economical (節省的)，這是學測超級易混淆考點。

chinese: 邊緣；優勢；刀刃；緩緩移動
example: Having professional experience gives young graduates a competitive edge in the job market.
writing_note: 常用於形容「競爭優勢 (competitive edge)」。

example: Are you sure these wild berries are edible? They look a bit suspicious.
writing_note: 描述某物是否可以安全食用，常用於戶外生存或食品安全題材。

example: The newspaper published a strong editorial criticizing the government"s new education policy.
writing_note: 指報社或雜誌表達官方立場的評論文章。

example: An educated workforce is essential for the economic growth of any modern nation.
writing_note: 描述具備知識背景與良好素養。

example: Advertising on social media is an effective way to reach a younger audience.
writing_note: 強調「能產生預期結果」。注意區分 efficient (效率高的)。

example: The new assembly line has significantly improved the factory"s production efficiency.
writing_note: 描述以最少資源/時間達成最大產出的能力。

chinese: 不費吹灰之力的；輕鬆的
example: She gave an effortless performance, making the complex dance routine look easy.
writing_note: 稱讚某人技術純熟，做起來像呼吸一樣簡單。

example: His large ego often gets in the way of his ability to work effectively in a team.
writing_note: 討論心理狀態或性格缺陷時常用（bruised ego 受挫的自尊）。

chinese: 詳盡的；複雜精美的；詳細說明
example: The chef prepared an elaborate seven-course meal for the visiting dignitaries.
writing_note: 當動詞時，常用於論說文中請求「進一步解釋 (elaborate on...)」。

chinese: 有彈性的；靈活的；橡皮筋
example: The price of luxury goods is often more elastic than that of essential food items.
writing_note: 物理上的彈性，或經濟學指需求隨價格變動的靈敏度。

example: The presidential election is held every four years in the United States.
writing_note: 討論民主、政治議題的核心單字。

example: The solution to the complex mathematical problem was surprisingly simple and elegant.
writing_note: 除了形容外表，也常用於讚美程式碼、理論或設計的「簡練美」。

chinese: 元素；成分；基礎；自然力量
example: Trust is a fundamental element in building a strong and lasting relationship.
writing_note: 描述構成整體的關鍵部分。常用片語：In one"s element (如魚得水)。

example: You need to master the elementary rules of grammar before you can write advanced essays.
writing_note: 描述學習的最早階段或最簡單的部分（elementary school 國小）。

chinese: 提升；提高（地位、高度）；鼓舞
example: The success of the project helped to elevate his status within the company.
writing_note: 比 lift 或 raise 正式。常用於提升靈魂、品味或地位。

chinese: 合格的；有資格的；理想的（結婚對象）
example: Only students with a GPA above 3.5 are eligible to apply for the scholarship.
writing_note: 描述符合特定規定的門檻。常用結構：Be eligible for / to + V。

example: The government is launching a new campaign to eliminate poverty in rural areas.
writing_note: 描述「徹底拔除」負面事物，或在比賽中被淘汰。

chinese: 雄辯的；口才流利的；有說服力的
example: She gave an eloquent speech that moved everyone in the audience to tears.
writing_note: 讚美演說或文章深具感染力與邏輯美。

chinese: 難以捉摸的；難記的；逃避的
example: The criminal has remained elusive for months, despite the intensive police search.
writing_note: 描述目標、答案或成功「看得到卻抓不住、很難達成」。

example: Technology has the power to emancipate people from tedious manual labor.
writing_note: 較正式的解放，常用於奴隸制度、政治權利或從舊思想中解脫。

chinese: 上船；著手；開始（新旅程、計畫）
example: After graduation, he decided to embark on a solo journey around the world.
writing_note: 常用結構：Embark on (開始)。用於描述重大且充滿期待的計畫。

example: I didn"t mean to embarrass you in front of your friends; it was just a joke.
writing_note: 形容使人感到侷促不安。注意形容詞 Embarrassing 與 Embarrassed。

example: Her latest novel seems to embody the spirit and struggles of the modern generation.
writing_note: 描述一個人或作品完美地「代表、詮釋」了某種精神或概念。

example: We should learn to embrace different cultures and perspectives with an open mind.
writing_note: 除了實體擁抱，更常用於「樂於接受新思想、新技術」。

example: New evidence emerged during the trial that proved the suspect"s innocence.
writing_note: 描述從隱蔽處出來，或新的問題、機會「浮現」。

example: In case of emergency, please follow the signs to the nearest exit.
writing_note: 描述需要立即行動的危險狀況。

example: The conference featured several eminent scientists from all over the world.
writing_note: 稱讚某人在其專業領域極具地位與聲望。

example: The factory was fined for emitting excessive amounts of smoke into the atmosphere.
writing_note: 環境與科學議題核心詞。描述物體主動向外散發能量或物質。

example: Music has the power to evoke deep emotions that words alone cannot express.
writing_note: 描述人類心理的各種感受。常用形容詞 Emotional (情緒化的)。

example: Empathy is a crucial skill for building healthy and lasting relationships.
writing_note: 15 級分作文常用字，比 sympathy (同情) 更強調「站在對方角度思考」。

example: The school puts a lot of emphasis on the development of creative thinking skills.
writing_note: 常用結構：Place/Put (an) emphasis on... (強調...)。注意複數形為 emphases。

chinese: 授權；使能夠；增強（某人的）自主權
example: The new project aims to empower women in rural areas by providing them with education.
writing_note: 描述賦予他人力量或權力去掌控自己的生活，語氣非常正面且具備力量感。

example: It is not wise to make empty promises that you have no intention of keeping.
writing_note: 除了物理空間的空，也常用於「虛假的承諾 (empty promises)」。

example: Many young athletes strive to emulate the success of their sporting heroes.
writing_note: 比 imitate 正式，帶有「將某人視為榜樣並渴望超越」的積極含義。

example: The new scholarship will enable several talented students to attend university.
writing_note: 常用結構：Enable someone to + V。描述提供條件或手段使目標達成。

example: We encountered several unexpected problems during the early stages of the project.
writing_note: 描述偶然遇見某人，或「遇到困難、危險」的正式動詞。

example: Teachers should encourage their students to ask questions and think critically.
writing_note: 常用結構：Encourage someone to + V。注意其名詞 Encouragement。

example: The giant panda is one of the most famous endangered species in the world.
writing_note: 環境議題必備詞（endangered species）。指面臨絕種威脅。

example: Despite her best endeavors, she was unable to finish the work on time.
writing_note: 比 effort 或 try 更正式且語氣更重的詞。指「為了艱巨目標而付出的巨大努力」。

chinese: （正式）贊同；支持；（在支票背面）簽名；代言
example: The committee voted to endorse the new safety regulations for the industry.
writing_note: 描述正式的認可，或著名人士為產品「代言、背書」。

example: The survivors had to endure terrible hardships during the long winter.
writing_note: 除了忍受痛苦，也可用於描述事物「經久不衰、持續存在」。

example: The young children were energetic and full of life during the school trip.
writing_note: 形容充滿動力與活力。注意名詞 Energy。

chinese: 強制執行（法律、規定）；強迫
example: The police are responsible for enforcing the laws and maintaining public order.
writing_note: 描述公權力或管理者確保規矩被遵守（enforcement 執行）。

example: The teacher tried to engage the students" interest with an exciting experiment.
writing_note: 常用於 engage in (參加) 或 be engaged to (與...訂婚)。

example: Adding fresh herbs to the soup will significantly enhance its flavor.
writing_note: 15 級分作文常用來替換 improve，描述在原有基礎上使之更好、更具吸引力。

example: The professor"s lecture helped to enlighten the students on the complexities of history.
writing_note: 描述使人消除偏見或無知，獲得更清晰的理解。

example: The company has made an enormous amount of money from its new online services.
writing_note: 描述體積、數量或程度驚人地大。

example: I would like to enquire about the availability of rooms for the weekend.
writing_note: 與 inquire 同義（enquire 偏英式）。常用於正式詢問資訊。

example: He decided to enroll in a computer coding course to improve his job prospects.
writing_note: 描述正式參加課程或組織（enrollment 註冊人數）。

example: Parents should ensure that their children have a healthy and balanced diet.
writing_note: 常用句型：Ensure that...。描述採取必要行動以保證某事發生。

example: The government is launching a new initiative to support small and medium enterprises.
writing_note: 除了公司，也指具有挑戰性的「事業」或一個人的「事業心」。

example: The students showed great enthusiasm for the new project and worked hard on it.
writing_note: 描述對某事充滿高度興趣與積極態度。形容詞 Enthusiastic。

example: The entire city was affected by the sudden power outage yesterday evening.
writing_note: 描述一個完整的整體，不留任何剩餘部分。

example: The membership card entitles you to a ten percent discount on all products.
writing_note: 常用結構：Be entitled to... (有權利獲得...)。也指給書、文章下標題。

example: The grand entrance of the museum is decorated with beautiful sculptures.
writing_note: 名詞指進入口；動詞（發音不同）指被美麗或神祕事物迷住。

example: He is a successful entrepreneur who has started several technology companies.
writing_note: 描述敢於承擔風險、創立新事業的人。高頻商業與現代社會議題字。

example: A positive learning environment can help students achieve their potential.
writing_note: 除了自然環境，也常用於「工作/學習環境」。

example: The architect envisions a futuristic city powered entirely by renewable energy.
writing_note: 描述對未來可能發生的情況進行「有畫面的構想」，常用於描述遠大目標。

chinese: 流行病；（壞事）盛行；流行性的
example: The country is struggling to contain a flu epidemic that has affected thousands of people.
writing_note: 除了醫學上的疾病傳播，也可用於形容社會問題的爆發（an epidemic of crime）。

example: The organization is fighting for gender equality and equal pay in the workplace.
writing_note: 討論人權、性別或社會正義時的核心名詞。

example: Countries located near the equator generally have a tropical climate throughout the year.
writing_note: 地理議題字。注意專有名詞通常要加 The 且第一個字母大寫。

example: It is difficult to maintain your emotional equilibrium when you are under constant stress.
writing_note: 比 balance 更正式，常用於物理、化學、經濟學或心理狀態的「穩定平衡」。

example: The modern laboratory is filled with expensive and sophisticated scientific equipment.
writing_note: 注意它是不可數名詞，不可加 s。這是學測文法常考細節。

example: Changing your diet is equivalent to taking medicine for some long-term health problems.
writing_note: 常用於比較兩件不同性質但「價值或效果相等」的事物（be equivalent to）。

example: The global health organization aims to eradicate the disease within the next decade.
writing_note: 比 eliminate 語氣更強，強調「連根拔起」地徹底清除負面事物（如貧窮、疾病）。

example: Constant inflation can slowly erode the value of people"s hard-earned savings.
writing_note: 除了地質上的風化侵蝕，常用於「權力、信心、價值」被逐漸損害。

example: The decision was based on erroneous information that had not been verified.
writing_note: 替換 wrong 的高階學術詞彙，常用於描述邏輯或資訊上的錯誤。

chinese: （使）逐步升級；越演越烈；（物價）上漲
example: The minor argument quickly escalated into a serious physical fight between the two neighbors.
writing_note: 描述衝突、壓力或成本「迅速擴大」的情況。

example: Patience and persistence are essential qualities for anyone who wants to succeed.
writing_note: 常用結構：It is essential that / to...。強調缺少了它就無法運作。

example: The company was established in 1995 and has since grown into a global brand.
writing_note: 除了開公司，也常用於「建立關係」或「確認事實 (establish the truth)」。

example: She is held in high esteem by her colleagues for her professionalism and kindness.
writing_note: 正式的敬重。常用於 self-esteem (自尊心)。

example: It is difficult to estimate the exact number of people who will attend the event.
writing_note: 描述根據不完全的資訊所做的初步判斷或數據推測。

example: The diamond is often used as a symbol of eternal love and commitment.
writing_note: 描述永遠存在、不受時間影響的事物。

chinese: 倫理的；道德的；合乎道德的
example: The company is committed to ethical sourcing and fair treatment of all its workers.
writing_note: 探討科技、醫療或商業行為是否正當時的核心詞彙。

example: We need to evaluate the potential risks before we decide to invest in the new project.
writing_note: 比 judge 正式，描述透過標準進行理性的「衡量與價值判斷」。

example: His confidence began to evaporate as he realized how difficult the task would be.
writing_note: 物理上的液體變氣體。比喻用法指「快速消失」。

example: Despite many setbacks, the eventual success of the mission brought great joy to the team.
writing_note: 形容經過一段時間或過程後「最終會發生」的結果。

example: There is strong scientific evidence to support the theory of global warming.
writing_note: 作文萬用詞。注意它通常是不可數名詞。動詞指「證明...的存在」。

example: It was evident from his facial expression that he was not happy with the decision.
writing_note: 描述一看就知道、不需要過多解釋的事實。常用結構：It is evident that...。

example: The old photographs evoked sweet memories of her childhood spent in the countryside.
writing_note: 描述外界事物觸發了內心深處的感觸。

example: The evolution of the internet has transformed the way we access and share information.
writing_note: 除了生物演化，也指技術或觀念「長期的進步與演變」。

example: He tends to exaggerate his achievements to make himself seem more impressive.
writing_note: 描述言過其實、將事實放大的行為。

example: The constant interruptions were beginning to exasperate the teacher.
writing_note: 程度比 annoy 強，指因重複且令人不悅的事而「感到極度不耐煩」。

example: The cost of the renovation eventually exceeded our initial budget by twenty percent.
writing_note: 描述數據、權限或速度超過規定的界限或預期。

example: She has always excelled in mathematics and science since she was a young child.
writing_note: 描述在某個領域表現極其出色（Excellent 的動詞形）。常用結構：Excel at / in...。

example: The library is open every day, with the exception of national holidays.
writing_note: 常用片語：With the exception of (除了...之外)。

example: Excessive use of electronic devices can lead to eye strain and poor sleep quality.
writing_note: 指超過了正常、合理或必要的限度，通常帶有負面意涵。

example: The cost of the tour excludes lunch, so you will need to bring your own food.
writing_note: 描述將某物或某人排除在範圍、計畫或群體之外。

example: The hotel provides exclusive access to a private beach for all its guests.
writing_note: 形容某種權利或物品是專屬的，或者指該場所檔次很高且限制進入。

example: The team worked hard to execute the plan exactly as it had been designed.
writing_note: 比 carry out 正式，常用於執行指令、計畫或完成高難度的技巧。

example: Peer pressure can exert a powerful influence on the behavior of teenagers.
writing_note: 常用於 exert pressure (施加壓力) 或 exert influence (發揮影響力)。

example: Take a deep breath, hold it for a few seconds, and then slowly exhale.
writing_note: 描述生理上的呼氣，與 inhale 成對。

chinese: 使精疲力竭；耗盡；排氣管；廢氣
example: We have exhausted all the available resources and need to find a new solution.
writing_note: 形容體力、資源或可能性被「徹底用完」。

example: The patient began to exhibit symptoms of the virus shortly after returning from travel.
writing_note: 除了博物館展出，也常用於描述一個人「表現出」某種情緒、特質或病徵。

example: The writer spent many years in exile after criticizing the government"s policies.
writing_note: 描述因政治原因被驅逐出境，或被迫離開家鄉。

example: Scientists are still searching for evidence regarding the existence of life on other planets.
writing_note: 描述某事物的真實存在，或指某種艱難的生活狀態。

chinese: 異國風情的；外來的；奇特的
example: The botanical garden features a wide variety of exotic plants from the Amazon rainforest.
writing_note: 形容充滿異國情調、令人感到新奇且與本地文化不同。

chinese: 擴張；擴大；展開（翅膀、計畫）
example: The company is planning to expand its business into the European market next year.
writing_note: 描述體積、規模、版圖或視野的增大。

example: Parents often have high expectations for their children"s academic performance.
writing_note: 常用片語：Meet someone"s expectations (符合某人的期待)。

example: The scientific expedition to the South Pole provided valuable data on climate change.
writing_note: 描述具有明確目的（如研究、探險）的長途旅行。

chinese: 開除；驅逐；排出（空氣、廢物）
example: The student was expelled from school for repeatedly violating the safety rules.
writing_note: 描述正式的開除或強行將某物從體內、境內排除。

example: The government"s expenditure on healthcare has increased significantly this year.
writing_note: 描述正式的、大額的資金或體力、時間的支出。

example: We need someone with expertise in international law to help us with the contract.
writing_note: 描述在特定領域所具備的深厚學問或高超技術。

example: Please check the back of the bottle to see when the medicine will expire.
writing_note: 描述法律效力、壽命或保存期限的終止。

chinese: 明確的；直言不諱的；詳述的
example: The teacher gave explicit instructions on how to complete the final project.
writing_note: 形容內容非常清楚、沒有任何含糊空間。與 implicit (隱含的) 對比。

chinese: 利用；剝削；開發；英勇事蹟
example: The movie explores the ways in which some companies exploit their workers in developing countries.
writing_note: 中性指「開發資源」，負面指「不當利用或剝削他人」。

example: In our history class, we will explore the causes of the French Revolution.
writing_note: 描述深入研究某個主題，或去一個陌生地方考察。

example: The situation in the region remains explosive and could lead to war at any time.
writing_note: 物理上的爆炸，或比喻局勢「隨時可能爆發衝突」。

example: There has been an exponential growth in the number of internet users over the last decade.
writing_note: 描述數據呈現「翻倍式、爆發性」的增長。

example: Taiwan is a major exporter of electronic components to countries all over the world.
writing_note: 描述將本國商品、服務或文化銷往國外。

example: The investigative reporter worked hard to expose the truth about the government scandal.
writing_note: 常用結構：Be exposed to... (暴露於/接觸到...)。指揭穿假象或使人置身於某種環境。

example: Regular exposure to a foreign language is the best way to become fluent.
writing_note: 描述媒體曝光度、接觸環境的機會或底片的感光。

chinese: 表達豐富的；生動的；表現的
example: The actor has a very expressive face that can convey complex emotions without words.
writing_note: 形容眼神、表情或藝術作品非常有神、會說話。

example: The museum display features several exquisite pieces of ancient jade jewelry.
writing_note: 程度極高的讚美詞，形容物品細節極其講究。也可指痛楚「劇烈」。

chinese: 延伸；延長（期限）；傳達；伸出
example: The school decided to extend the deadline for the final project by one week.
writing_note: 描述空間的長度、時間的延後或正式的邀請/問候（extend an invitation）。

chinese: 廣泛的；大規模的；廣闊的
example: The rescue team conducted an extensive search of the area for the missing hiker.
writing_note: 描述範圍、知識或損害非常巨大且全面。

example: The company needs to consider both internal and external factors when making its plans.
writing_note: 與 internal (內部的) 對比，指外在的環境、影響或外觀。

chinese: 絕種的；（火山）死掉的；熄滅的
example: Dinosaurs became extinct millions of years before humans appeared on Earth.
writing_note: 環境與科學議題的核心詞（become extinct）。

chinese: 拔出；取出；提取；精華；選段
example: The chemist worked hard to extract the healing ingredients from the rare plant.
writing_note: 描述拔牙、提煉成分或從書中摘錄片段。

chinese: 非凡的；令人驚嘆的；離奇的
example: She has an extraordinary talent for languages and can speak six fluently.
writing_note: 強調完全超乎尋常、極其出色的程度。

example: He was criticized for his extravagant lifestyle while the company was losing money.
writing_note: 描述花錢毫無節制，或言行、要求過度誇張。

chinese: 偽造；捏造（謊言、證據）；製造
example: The suspect was caught trying to fabricate an alibi to avoid being arrested.
writing_note: 帶有負面意涵，指為了欺騙而「編造」事實。

example: The new modern airport was built to facilitate international trade and tourism.
writing_note: 15 級分作文常用來替換 help，指提供便利條件使過程更順暢。

example: The political party was split into several different factions with opposing views.
writing_note: 描述一個大組織內部因為意見不合而形成的小圈子。

chinese: 因素；要素；因數；將…納入考慮
example: Economic instability was a major factor in the decision to delay the project.
writing_note: 作文萬用詞。常用片語：Factor in (考量進去)。

chinese: （身體、精神）機能；才能；全體教職員
example: He is lucky to have all his mental faculties intact after the serious accident.
writing_note: 指一個人的聽覺、視覺等機能，或指大學的一個學院/全體老師。

example: Some people think that social media is just a fad that will eventually disappear.
writing_note: 描述那種來得快去得也快、缺乏持久價值的熱潮。

chinese: 模糊的；微弱的；頭暈的；昏厥
example: I heard a faint noise coming from the basement and went to investigate.
writing_note: 描述聲音、顏色、氣味或希望非常微弱。

example: The dog is often praised for being a faithful companion to its owner.
writing_note: 形容對伴侶、信仰的忠貞，或對原著、事實的忠實呈現。

example: The politician was accused of spreading falsehoods during the election campaign.
writing_note: 比 lie 更正式，指「不真實的事物」或「說謊的行為」。

example: Her confidence began to falter when she saw the size of the audience.
writing_note: 描述因恐懼或失去信心而產生的猶豫、動搖。

example: New employees need time to familiarize themselves with the company"s software.
writing_note: 常用結構：Familiarize oneself with... (使自己熟悉...)。

example: He is a health fanatic who spends three hours at the gym every single day.
writing_note: 形容對某種興趣、宗教或政治極度且有時過度狂熱的人。

example: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely fantastic and worth the climb.
writing_note: 常用的極高讚美詞。也指極具想像力的奇幻事物。

example: Ancient history has always fascinated me, especially the Egyptian pyramids.
writing_note: 描述某事強烈激發了一個人的好奇心與興趣。

example: The area has become very fashionable recently, with many new shops and cafes.
writing_note: 形容穿著、生活方式或地方符合目前的潮流。

chinese: 致命的；災難性的；決定命運的
example: The driver suffered fatal injuries in the serious car accident yesterday.
writing_note: 形容導致死亡的（fatal accident）或導致失敗的關鍵錯誤（fatal mistake）。

example: Many healthcare workers are suffering from severe fatigue due to the pandemic.
writing_note: 比 tiredness 正式，描述因長期勞累而產生的深度身心疲憊。

chinese: 有缺點的；有故障的；錯誤的
example: The fire was caused by faulty electrical wiring in the old building.
writing_note: 形容設備、零件有瑕疵，或邏輯、推理有誤（faulty logic）。

example: After a thorough study, the committee decided that the project was not feasible.
writing_note: 評估一個計畫或方案在實際執行面上是否「做得到」。

chinese: 特徵；特色；專題報導；以…為特色
example: The new smartphone includes several innovative features that its competitors lack.
writing_note: 作文萬用詞。動詞指「特別介紹」或「具備...特點」。

example: The International Tennis Federation is responsible for the rules of the game.
writing_note: 描述由多個小單位組成的大型聯合組織。

example: He made a feeble attempt to apologize, but no one believed he was sincere.
writing_note: 形容身體弱、聲音小，或藉口、努力完全不給力（a feeble excuse）。

example: We welcome any feedback you can provide to help us improve our services.
writing_note: 描述對表現、產品或計畫的評價與改善建議。

example: The hikers were warned to stay away from the ferocious mother bear and her cubs.
writing_note: 形容野獸兇狠，也可指程度極強的風暴或競爭。

example: We took a ferry across the river to save time on our journey to the city.
writing_note: 描述水上的公共交通工具，或短程的來回接送。

chinese: 肥沃的；多產的；（想像力）豐富的
example: The valley is famous for its fertile soil, which produces a variety of crops.
writing_note: 除了土地肥沃，也常用於形容「想像力豐富 (fertile imagination)」。

example: He is a fervent supporter of animal rights and spends his weekends volunteering.
writing_note: 描述內心深處極為真誠且熱切的情感或信念。

example: The town holds a music festival every summer that attracts thousands of tourists.
writing_note: 描述有組織、充滿歡樂氛圍的慶祝活動。

example: Could you please fetch some extra chairs from the other room for our guests?
writing_note: 指「去那邊取回某物」。也可用於拍賣中物品售出的價格。

example: The two families have been involved in a bitter feud for several generations.
writing_note: 描述兩個群體或家庭之間根深蒂固、難以化解的長期仇恨。

example: It can be difficult to separate truth from fiction in some political news reports.
writing_note: 除了文學體裁，也指編造出來的故事或謊言。

example: The movie is a high-fidelity adaptation of the original award-winning novel.
writing_note: 描述對伴侶的忠貞，或電子設備/翻譯對原件的還原程度（Hi-Fi）。

example: The companies are in fierce competition to dominate the new technology market.
writing_note: 常用於描述「激烈的競爭 (fierce competition)」或強大的情感。

chinese: 數字；外形；人物；算計；認為
example: The latest figures show a significant increase in the number of overseas students.
writing_note: 作文萬用詞。可指數據、歷史名人或一個人的體態。

example: You should use a filter to remove any impurities from the river water before drinking.
writing_note: 除了物理過濾，也可用於社交媒體濾鏡或資訊的篩選。

example: The government provided a massive loan to help finance the new public library.
writing_note: 描述與金錢管理相關的事務，或為大型計畫募資。

example: We must remember that the Earth has a finite amount of natural resources.
writing_note: 與 infinite 對比，常用於環保題材，強調資源並非取之不盡。

example: Despite the pressure, she remained firm in her decision to resign from the committee.
writing_note: 形容肉質結實、立場堅定，或指規模較小的合夥企業（law firm）。

example: Regular exercise is the best way to maintain your physical fitness and energy.
writing_note: 描述身體健康狀況或一個人是否適任某職位。

example: It was a fitting tribute to a man who had dedicated his life to environmental protection.
writing_note: 形容某個行為或評論與當下的場合非常貼切。

chinese: 固定的；不變的；（表情）僵硬的
example: The bank offers a fixed interest rate for the first five years of the mortgage.
writing_note: 描述價格、時間或地點已經決定好，不會變動。

chinese: 公然的；罪惡昭彰的；不能忽視的
example: The new policy was a flagrant violation of international human rights laws.
writing_note: 語氣極重，用來批評那些「明目張膽且不可容忍」的錯誤或犯罪。

chinese: 華麗的；引人注目的；炫耀的
example: The pop star is known for her flamboyant costumes and high-energy stage shows.
writing_note: 形容風格極其鮮豔、誇張且充滿自信。常用於描述藝術、服飾或性格。

chinese: 奉承；討好；使顯得更漂亮
example: I believe he is only trying to flatter you because he wants a favor.
writing_note: 描述過度稱讚以求利益，或形容衣服讓一個人的身材顯得更好看。

example: The diamond was sold at a lower price because of a tiny flaw on its surface.
writing_note: 指產品的物理缺陷，或指論點、計畫中的邏輯漏洞（a fatal flaw）。

example: The company maintains a large fleet of trucks to deliver products across the country.
writing_note: 指由同一個組織管理的所有車輛或飛機。形容詞指動作敏捷（fleet-footed）。

example: Happiness can be fleeting, so it is important to appreciate every good moment.
writing_note: 描述如光陰、記憶或笑容般飛快消失的事物。

chinese: 有彈性的；靈活的；易彎曲的
example: Having a flexible work schedule allows me to spend more time with my family.
writing_note: 描述物體柔軟，或指計畫、性格具有很強的「應變能力」。

chinese: 繁榮；興旺；茁壯；裝飾性的動作
example: Local businesses began to flourish after the new trade agreement was signed.
writing_note: 描述文明、植物或事業在良好環境下「蓬勃發展」。

example: Stock prices can fluctuate significantly based on global economic news.
writing_note: 描述數據、情緒或氣溫在一定範圍內「不穩定地變動」。

example: To get this job, you must be fluent in at least two foreign languages.
writing_note: 描述語言表達無障礙，或動作（如舞蹈）極其順滑。

chinese: 流體；液體；不固定的；易變的
example: The political situation in the region remains fluid and could change quickly.
writing_note: 除了科學上的流體，常用於形容「變動不居、尚未定型」的局勢。

example: We need to focus our attention on solving the most urgent problems first.
writing_note: 作文萬用動詞。常用結構：Focus on... (專注於...)。

example: The law forbids the sale of alcohol to anyone under the age of eighteen.
writing_note: 語氣較為強硬且直接。常用結構：Forbid someone to + V 或 Forbid someone from + V-ing。

example: The weather forecast predicts a significant drop in temperature for the weekend.
writing_note: 常用於「天氣預報 (weather forecast)」或「經濟預測 (economic forecast)」。

chinese: 外國的；外來的；（與現狀）不符的
example: Learning a foreign language is a great way to understand a different culture.
writing_note: 描述異國事物。比喻用法指「不熟悉的、不相干的 (be foreign to...)」。

example: It is difficult to foresee exactly how technology will change our lives in the future.
writing_note: 描述在事情發生前就預先察覺到可能性（foreseeable future 可見的未來）。

example: As people get older, they often become more forgetful about small daily tasks.
writing_note: 形容人容易忘東忘西。注意其名詞 Forgetfulness。

example: The committee worked hard to formulate a new policy for environmental protection.
writing_note: 描述經過仔細思考後「擬定」計畫、政策或理論。

example: I was fortunate enough to get a scholarship that paid for my university tuition.
writing_note: 比 lucky 正式。常用結構：Be fortunate to + V 或 It is fortunate that...。

example: The school aims to foster a love of learning and creativity in every student.
writing_note: 15 級分作文高頻動詞，描述「營造環境以培養」某種特質或關係。

example: A strong family relationship provides the foundation for a child"s emotional growth.
writing_note: 描述建築的地基，也常用於「理論或成功的基礎 (lay the foundation for...)」。

example: The ecosystem in this region is extremely fragile and easily damaged by pollution.
writing_note: 形容物理上的易碎，或心理、局勢、健康狀態的「脆弱不堪」。

example: Archaeologists found several fragments of ancient pottery buried deep in the ground.
writing_note: 描述破碎的殘骸，或指不完整的資訊與記憶片段。

example: The new law provides a legal framework for protecting intellectual property rights.
writing_note: 描述論點、計畫或政策運作的「基本架構」。

chinese: 特許經營權；加盟店；選舉權
example: He decided to open a fast-food franchise after working in the industry for years.
writing_note: 現代商業用語（加盟）。歷史脈絡中指「公民投票權」。

example: To be frank, I think your plan is a bit too ambitious for our current budget.
writing_note: 常用於「老實說 (To be frank)」。形容說話直接不隱瞞。

chinese: 發狂的；手忙腳亂的；緊張忙亂的
example: There was a frantic search for the missing child after he disappeared from the park.
writing_note: 形容因恐懼、焦慮或趕時間而產生的「極度混亂與急迫」。

example: He was arrested for credit card fraud and sentenced to three years in prison.
writing_note: 法律用語，指為了非法獲利而進行的欺騙行為。

example: Freedom of speech is a fundamental right in any democratic society.
writing_note: 核心社會價值詞。常用片語：Freedom from... (免於...的自由)。

example: Regular and frequent exercise is essential for maintaining good physical health.
writing_note: 形容發生次數多。動詞指「常去（某個場所）」。

example: There has been a lot of friction between the two countries over trade policies.
writing_note: 物理上的摩擦，也比喻人際或國際間的「摩擦、小衝突」。

example: The local people were very friendly and helpful to the lost tourists.
writing_note: 形容態度好。也可用於複合詞（environmentally friendly 環保的）。

example: The sudden loud noise frightened the small birds and made them fly away.
writing_note: 形容使人感到驚恐。注意形容詞 Frightening 與 Frightened。

example: By living a frugal life and saving money, they were able to buy their own house.
writing_note: 形容用錢小心、生活簡單，是具正面評價的節儉。

example: The lack of progress in the negotiations began to frustrate both sides.
writing_note: 形容因無法達成目標而產生的「挫敗感」。

chinese: 實現；履行（諾言、義務）；滿足
example: He worked hard for many years to fulfill his dream of becoming a professional pilot.
writing_note: 描述「達成夢想 (fulfill a dream)」或「履行職責 (fulfill duties)」。

chinese: 功能；職責；盛大集會；運作
example: The main function of the heart is to pump blood throughout the entire body.
writing_note: 描述某物的用途或一個人正常運作的能力。

example: Education is a fundamental human right that should be available to everyone.
writing_note: 比 basic 強烈且正式。描述構成事物核心的最重要部分。

example: She was furious with him for forgetting their anniversary for the second time.
writing_note: 描述「極度憤怒」。也可用於形容猛烈的風暴或活動。

example: The library is well furnished with modern desks and comfortable chairs.
writing_note: 除了佈置房間，也可用於「提供資訊/證據 (furnish details)」。

example: It is futile to argue with someone who refuses to listen to reason.
writing_note: 形容不管怎麼努力都不會產生任何結果的挫折感。

example: Traveling provides a great opportunity to gain a fresh perspective on life.
writing_note: 作文萬用動詞。除了指獲得利益，也常用於「獲得經驗/知識/體重」。

example: The art gallery features a collection of contemporary works by local artists.
writing_note: 描述展覽藝術品的場所。

example: Starting a new business is always a gamble, but it can be very rewarding.
writing_note: 比喻用法指「採取風險極大的行動」。

example: After I graduate from university, I plan to pursue a career in international law.
writing_note: 常用結構：Graduate from (從...畢業)。注意名詞發音不同。

example: The hotel has a grand entrance decorated with crystal chandeliers and marble floors.
writing_note: 形容規模宏大且氣派十足。也可用於 Grand total (總計)。

example: The government granted him a research scholarship to study renewable energy.
writing_note: 描述正式的給予。常用片語：Take it for granted (視為理所當然)。

chinese: 圖解的；生動的；（描寫）繪聲繪色的；圖表
example: The documentary provides a graphic account of the struggles faced by refugees.
writing_note: 除了電腦圖形，也指描述得非常「具體、有畫面感」，有時指尺度較大的描寫。

example: It took me a while to grasp the complex concepts of quantum physics.
writing_note: 除了物理上的抓握，常用於指「理解難懂的想法」。

example: I am extremely grateful for all the support my teachers gave me during the exam period.
writing_note: 書信作文必備。常用結構：Be grateful to someone for something。

chinese: 令人滿足的；使人喜悅的
example: It was very gratifying to see that my hard work finally resulted in success.
writing_note: 形容某件事「讓人感到欣慰或有成就感」。

example: I would like to express my deep gratitude for your kind hospitality during my visit.
writing_note: 描述心中的謝意。常用結構：Express one"s gratitude to...

example: The doctor"s expression was grave as he explained the risks of the surgery.
writing_note: 形容情況非常危急（grave danger）或人臉色凝重。注意與墳墓同字。

example: The scientists are studying the effects of zero gravity on the human body.
writing_note: 除了科學上的引力，也常用於描述問題的「嚴重程度 (the gravity of the situation)」。

example: It is important not to be greedy and to share what you have with those in need.
writing_note: 形容對金錢、食物或權力過度的慾望。

example: The burning of fossil fuels contributes to the greenhouse effect and global warming.
writing_note: 環境議題核心詞（greenhouse effect 溫室效應；greenhouse gases 溫室氣體）。

example: The family was overwhelmed with grief after the sudden loss of their grandfather.
writing_note: 描述因失去親友或重大打擊而產生的深刻痛苦。

example: Employees can submit their grievances to the human resources department for review.
writing_note: 指因為受到不公平對待而產生的正式「申訴」或心中積怨。

chinese: 嚴酷的；冷酷的；（消息）令人沮喪的
example: The economic outlook for the next year remains grim due to rising inflation.
writing_note: 形容情況極其糟糕、毫無希望，或表情冷峻。

example: The daily grind of commuting and office work can be very exhausting over time.
writing_note: 除了物理磨碎，比喻用法指「枯燥繁重的日常工作 (daily grind)」。

chinese: 總共的；噁心的；粗俗的；總收入
example: The movie grossed over one hundred million dollars in its first week of release.
writing_note: 經濟上指「總額 (gross profit)」，口語中常用來形容「噁心、反感」。

example: The rumors about his resignation proved to be completely groundless.
writing_note: 形容指控、擔憂或傳聞完全沒有事實依據。

example: The students were grouped according to their level of English proficiency.
writing_note: 基本的組織單位。動詞指將性質相近的人事物放在一起。

example: Personal growth and lifelong learning are essential for a fulfilling career.
writing_note: 描述數據增加、個人成長或植物生長。

example: The new laptop comes with a two-year guarantee that covers all technical defects.
writing_note: 描述對產品品質的承諾，或確保某事一定會發生。

example: Security cameras were installed to guard the building against theft and vandalism.
writing_note: 常用片語：On one"s guard (提防著) 或 Guard against (防範)。

example: The young athlete credited his success to the expert guidance of his coach.
writing_note: 描述從專家或長輩那裡獲得的建議與指引。

example: The government issued new guidelines for healthy eating and regular exercise.
writing_note: 描述非強制性但建議遵守的「行動準則」，通常為複數 guidelines。

example: He was overwhelmed with guilt after realizing how much he had hurt his friend"s feelings.
writing_note: 描述內心的自責感（guilt trip），或法律上的犯罪事實。

example: The destruction of the rainforest is threatening the natural habitat of many rare species.
writing_note: 環境保護議題的核心單字（natural habitat）。

example: Production in the factory was brought to a halt due to a sudden power outage.
writing_note: 比 stop 正式，常用於描述「進程、活動或交通」的突然中斷。

example: Rescue efforts were hampered by the heavy rain and thick fog in the mountains.
writing_note: 描述因環境或障礙物使得行動變得「困難、受阻」。

chinese: 殘障；障礙；不利條件；阻礙
example: The lack of reliable internet access is a major handicap for students in remote areas.
writing_note: 指身體殘疾（現代多用 disability），也比喻使人成功的「不利因素」。

example: The customer service representative is trained to handle complaints with patience and tact.
writing_note: 作文萬用動詞。描述「解決問題、處理情緒或操作機器」。

chinese: 英俊的；（數量）可觀的；大方的
example: The company offered him a handsome salary and excellent benefits to join the team.
writing_note: 除了形容外表，常用於形容「金額或利潤非常豐厚 (a handsome profit)」。

chinese: 隨意的；無計畫的；雜亂無章的
example: The books were arranged in a haphazard way, making it difficult to find anything.
writing_note: 形容做事沒有條理，純粹靠運氣或隨機決定。

example: The university has a strict policy against any form of sexual or verbal harassment.
writing_note: 校園與職場議題核心詞（sexual harassment 性騷擾）。

example: Many families endured great financial hardship during the global economic depression.
writing_note: 描述因缺乏金錢、食物或極端環境而導致的實體苦難。

example: The goal of the project is to help people from different backgrounds live in harmony.
writing_note: 常用片語：In harmony with... (與...協調一致)。

example: The prisoner was forced to endure harsh treatment and poor living conditions.
writing_note: 形容天氣惡劣（harsh winter）或批評、處罰極其不留情面。

example: Farmers are preparing to harvest their crops after a long and productive summer.
writing_note: 除了農業收成，也比喻為「努力後的成果」。

example: In his haste to catch the train, he left his briefcase on the kitchen table.
writing_note: 描述為了趕時間而產生的急促感。常用片語：In haste (匆忙地)。

example: The manager"s haughty attitude made it difficult for employees to talk to him.
writing_note: 描述因自視甚高而對他人顯露出輕蔑的態度。

example: Smoking in bed is a major fire hazard and should be avoided at all costs.
writing_note: 指潛在的危險源（health hazard 健康隱患）。

example: The earthquake in the region made headlines all over the world this morning.
writing_note: 常用片語：Hit the headlines (登上頭條)。

example: The government is investing more money in public health services and hospitals.
writing_note: 基本的生理/心理狀態。注意形容詞 Healthy 與 Healthful。

example: I would like to express my heartfelt thanks to everyone who supported me.
writing_note: 情感強度極高的讚美，常用於道歉、感謝或問候。

example: The two politicians were involved in a heated argument over the new tax law.
writing_note: 常用於形容「激烈的討論/爭論 (heated discussion/debate)」。

example: After a hectic week at the office, I am looking forward to a relaxing weekend.
writing_note: 形容生活節奏極其忙碌、讓人喘不過氣的狀態。

example: The suspense in the movie was heightened by the haunting and mysterious music.
writing_note: 描述情感、張力或警覺性的提升。

example: Prince William is the immediate heir to the British throne.
writing_note: 注意其第一個字母 h 不發音，唸法與 air 相同。

example: It is our responsibility to protect and preserve our rich cultural heritage.
writing_note: 特指歷史流傳下來的、具有非凡價值的文化或精神資產（World Heritage Site）。

example: Don"t hesitate to contact me if you need any further information or help.
writing_note: 描述因不確定而產生的暫停。常用於書信結尾（Don"t hesitate to...）。

example: In most companies, there is a clear hierarchy from the CEO down to the employees.
writing_note: 描述組織內部地位高低的排列結構。

chinese: 強調；凸顯；最精彩的部分
example: The report highlights the urgent need for investment in renewable energy.
writing_note: 動詞指使某事引人注目；名詞指活動中最引以為傲的高潮點。

example: The lack of funds has hindered the progress of the scientific research project.
writing_note: 描述使某事進展變得困難或緩慢。

example: He dropped several hints that he was planning to propose to his girlfriend.
writing_note: 指不直接說出、而是透過微小的訊息讓對方明白。

example: Her favorite hobby is gardening, which helps her relax after a long day at work.
writing_note: 描述在閒暇時間為了樂趣而進行的活動。

example: His words sounded hollow and insincere after he had betrayed our trust.
writing_note: 物理上的空心，或比喻言語、承諾缺乏誠意（hollow promises）。

example: To be honest, I think we need more time to finish the project properly.
writing_note: 常用於「老實說 (To be honest)」。注意其名詞 Honesty。

example: It is a great honor to be invited to give a speech at the graduation ceremony.
writing_note: 描述獲得極高的評價與尊重。動詞指履行合約或尊重某人。

example: We would like to thank our hosts for their incredible hospitality during our stay.
writing_note: 描述對客人的熱情招待。常用於旅遊、餐飲或感謝信。

chinese: 敵對的；不友好的；惡劣的
example: The local people were hostile toward the newcomers, making it hard for them to settle.
writing_note: 形容充滿敵意的環境或人。常用於描述軍事行動或惡劣的氣候。

example: The scientists are conducting experiments to test their original hypothesis.
writing_note: 科學或學術寫作的核心詞彙。複數形為 hypotheses。

example: The beach was the ideal place for a relaxing weekend away from the city.
writing_note: 形容符合最高標準的狀態。也指一個人追求的完美境界。

example: The two buildings are identical in design, though they were built years apart.
writing_note: 強調一模一樣，常用於形容「同卵雙胞胎 (identical twins)」。

example: The witness was able to identify the suspect from a group of several men.
writing_note: 常用結構：Identify with someone (認同/感同身受某人)。

example: Traveling to different countries helped him explore and define his own identity.
writing_note: 探討自我、文化或隱私議題的核心詞彙（identity theft 身分盜用）。

example: The political party is based on a conservative ideology that values tradition.
writing_note: 描述某個群體、政黨或時代所信奉的一整套核心觀念。

example: To get high marks on the English test, you need to understand common idioms.
writing_note: 指由幾個單字組成、意思無法從表面解釋的固定用法。

chinese: 無所事事的；閒置的；懶散的
example: The machines in the factory have been sitting idle since the strike began.
writing_note: 形容人懶散，或指機器、時間被浪費、未被利用。

chinese: 點燃；激發；引起（火災、戰爭）
example: The coach"s speech was designed to ignite a passion for victory in the players.
writing_note: 除了物理點火，常用於比喻「點燃熱情、激起爭議」。

example: Public ignorance about the disease led to unnecessary fear and discrimination.
writing_note: 形容對特定事實或知識的缺乏。注意形容詞 Ignorant。

example: Driving while under the influence of alcohol is illegal in most countries.
writing_note: 法律議題必備詞。形容違反法律規定的行為。

example: The magician used mirrors and lighting to create an amazing optical illusion.
writing_note: 描述看起來是真的但實際上是假的事物（optical illusion 視錯覺）。

example: The speaker used several real-life examples to illustrate his complex theory.
writing_note: 論說文常用詞，描述透過例子或圖片使複雜的概念變得容易理解。

example: Children have a vivid imagination that allows them to turn simple boxes into spaceships.
writing_note: 形容腦海中構思新奇事物的能力。常用形容詞 Imaginative。

example: Young children often try to imitate the behaviors and speech of their parents.
writing_note: 描述模仿動作、聲音或風格。注意與 emulate (效法並求超越) 的區別。

chinese: 立即的；直接的；最接近的
example: The government took immediate action to provide aid to the flood victims.
writing_note: 形容時間上的緊迫，也指血緣、環境上「最親近的 (immediate family)」。

example: The scientists have made immense progress in the field of cancer research.
writing_note: 15 級分作文常用來替換 big，強調數量、壓力或規模極其驚人。

example: Many people choose to immigrate to Canada in search of better job opportunities.
writing_note: 注意與 emigrate (移居國外) 的區別：I 代表 In (移進來)。

example: The dark clouds and strong wind suggested that a storm was imminent.
writing_note: 形容不好的事、危險或災難「迫在眉睫」。

chinese: 免疫的；免除的；不受影響的
example: No one is immune to the effects of stress, no matter how strong they seem.
writing_note: 常用結構：Be immune to...。生理上指免疫，比喻用法指「不受...的負面影響」。

example: The new environmental laws will have a significant impact on the local industry.
writing_note: 15 級分作文的核心動詞/名詞，比 effect 有力量感。常用結構：Have an impact on...。

example: Driving while tired can seriously impair your reaction time and judgment.
writing_note: 描述機能、能力（如聽力、視力、判斷力）被「損害、降低」。

example: A judge must remain impartial and make decisions based solely on the evidence.
writing_note: 形容不偏袒任何一方。是社會正義議題的重要詞彙。

example: The lack of funding is a major impediment to the progress of our research.
writing_note: 正式用詞，指讓進度變得困難的「絆腳石」。也用於「口吃 (speech impediment)」。

chinese: 迫切的；極重要的；祈使句
example: It is imperative that we take immediate action to address the climate crisis.
writing_note: 比 urgent 強烈。常用句型：It is imperative that... (極其重要，務必... )。

example: Everyone has imperfections, and it is important to learn to accept ourselves.
writing_note: 描述人格、物體或作品中的「小瑕疵」。

example: The government is planning to implement new policies to reduce traffic congestion.
writing_note: 比 carry out 正式，常用於「實施計畫、政策或法律」。

chinese: 含蓄的；暗示的；無疑問的
example: There was an implicit agreement between the two teams not to talk to the media.
writing_note: 描述雖未明說、但彼此心中有數的「默契」或「隱含意義」。

example: His comments seemed to imply that the project would be canceled soon.
writing_note: 描述話中帶話，非直接表達。注意與 infer (讀者推斷) 的對應關係。

example: The government decided to impose a new tax on luxury goods and services.
writing_note: 常用結構：Impose A on B。通常指「違背意願地強加」稅金、規定或觀點。

example: Wearing high heels for a long hike in the mountains is very impractical.
writing_note: 形容想法太過理想化、在現實中「行不通」或「不好用」。

chinese: 令人印象深刻的；卓越的
example: She gave an impressive presentation that left the entire board of directors speechless.
writing_note: 稱讚表現優異或規模宏大（an impressive achievement）。

example: When the microphone failed, the speaker had to improvise for the rest of the talk.
writing_note: 描述在沒有準備的情況下，利用現有資源隨機應變。

example: I bought the expensive watch on impulse and regretted it the very next day.
writing_note: 描述未經深思熟慮的突然念頭（impulse buying 衝動購物）。

chinese: 難以接近的；達不到的；難懂的
example: The mountain village becomes completely inaccessible during the heavy winter snow.
writing_note: 物理上的無法進入，或指藝術、文字太過深奧讓人「看不懂」。

example: The current healthcare system is inadequate to meet the needs of the aging population.
writing_note: 形容資源不足以達成目標，或人感到自己能力不足。

example: The company offers financial incentives to employees who meet their monthly sales targets.
writing_note: 社會與經濟議題高頻詞。指驅使人採取行動的利益或獎勵。

example: The police are investigating a serious incident that occurred in the city center last night.
writing_note: 通常指「負面、突發或不尋常」的單一事件。

example: She has a natural inclination toward music and spent hours practicing the violin.
writing_note: 描述內心不自覺的偏好或行為趨勢。

example: Lack of sleep can incline people to make more mistakes during the day.
writing_note: 常用結構：Be inclined to + V (傾向於...)。常用於禮貌地表達觀點。

example: The price of the tour includes all meals, transportation, and entrance fees.
writing_note: 作文萬用詞。注意其介係詞形式 Including 與 Included。

chinese: 包容廣泛的；包含在內的
example: The school promotes an inclusive environment where every student feels welcome.
writing_note: 現代社會核心詞（inclusive education 融合教育）。指不排除任何群體。

example: Families with a low income may be eligible for financial aid from the government.
writing_note: 描述個人或家庭賺取的金錢（income tax 所得稅）。

chinese: 不相容的；矛盾的；不能共存的
example: Their ideas about how to run the company were completely incompatible.
writing_note: 形容軟體不支援，或兩人的價值觀、目標水火不容。

chinese: 無能的；不勝任的；無能力者
example: The manager was criticized for being incompetent and failing to lead his team.
writing_note: 帶有強烈負面批評，指缺乏完成工作所需的基本能力。

chinese: 不一致的；反覆無常的；矛盾的
example: The witness"s latest story is inconsistent with the evidence found at the scene.
writing_note: 描述言行不一，或數據、表現起伏不定。

example: We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the delay of the flight.
writing_note: 商務書信常用語，用來禮貌地對造成的麻煩致歉。

example: The new design incorporates several features suggested by our customers.
writing_note: 描述將新元素有機地整合進現有的系統或計畫中。

example: She has an incredible memory and can recite long poems after reading them once.
writing_note: 口語中常用的最高級讚美。指好到令人不敢相信。

chinese: 招致；引起；遭受；蒙受（損失、債務）
example: You may incur extra charges if you do not return the rented car on time.
writing_note: 常用於負面脈絡，如招致憤怒（incur anger）或蒙受債務。

example: He is so indecisive that he spent thirty minutes just choosing which movie to watch.
writing_note: 形容人做事猶豫不決。注意其名詞形 Indecision。

example: The country celebrated its fiftieth year of independence with a grand parade.
writing_note: 國家主權獨立或個人不依賴他人的生活狀態。

example: The latest research indicates that a healthy diet can reduce the risk of heart disease.
writing_note: 學術或論說文常用詞，描述數據或跡象顯示出某種結果。

chinese: 漠不關心的；平庸的；中立的
example: He seemed indifferent to the suffering of others, which shocked his friends.
writing_note: 描述毫無興趣、不在乎的負面態度。常用結構：Be indifferent to...。

example: The museum features an exhibit on the culture of the indigenous peoples of the region.
writing_note: 特指某地原生的（indigenous species 原生物種；indigenous culture 原民文化）。

example: The public felt a sense of indignation after learning about the government scandal.
writing_note: 指因為感到不公平、卑鄙或邪惡而引發的「正義之怒」。

chinese: 不可或缺的；絕對必要的
example: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of modern daily life.
writing_note: 比 essential 強烈，指「一旦少了它，一切都無法運作」。

example: The school aims to meet the individual needs of every student in the classroom.
writing_note: 強調作為單一實體的人，而非群體的一部分。

example: The medicine can induce drowsiness, so you should not drive after taking it.
writing_note: 科學或醫療用語中，描述「引發」某種狀態或生理反應。

example: After a week of hard work, I decided to indulge in a luxurious spa treatment.
writing_note: 描述放任自己享受某物（indulge in...）。帶有稍微奢侈的意味。

example: The industrial revolution transformed the way goods were produced and sold.
writing_note: 描述與工廠、生產或經濟產業相關的事務（industrial waste 工業廢料）。

example: The industrious student spent every evening in the library preparing for the exam.
writing_note: 比 hardworking 更正式，形容一個人如同小蜜蜂般穩定且持續地努力。

chinese: 不可避免的；必然發生的
example: With the rapid growth of the city, some traffic problems are inevitable.
writing_note: 作文萬用副詞形：Inevitably。描述某個結果是邏輯或形勢下的必然。

example: Cooking at home is generally more inexpensive than eating out at a restaurant.
writing_note: 比 cheap 更有禮貌，單純描述價格低廉，不帶有「品質差」的貶義。

example: Laughter is highly infectious; once one person starts, everyone else follows.
writing_note: 除了生理疾病，常用於比喻「情緒、熱情」極具感染力。

example: From his angry expression, I inferred that he was not happy with the result.
writing_note: 描述讀者或聽者根據已知訊息所做的邏輯推論。與 imply (作者暗示) 相對。

example: The fake handbag was made of inferior materials and fell apart quickly.
writing_note: 形容品質較差或地位較低。常用結構：Be inferior to...。

example: The universe is so vast that it can sometimes seem almost infinite.
writing_note: 描述空間、時間或可能性沒有盡頭。

example: High inflation can reduce the purchasing power of people"s hard-earned savings.
writing_note: 經濟議題核心詞，指物價持續上漲、貨幣價值縮水。

example: Peer pressure can have a powerful influence on the behavior of teenagers.
writing_note: 作文萬用詞。常用結構：Have an influence on...。注意其形容詞 Influential。

chinese: 非正式的；口語的；隨意的
example: We had an informal meeting over coffee to discuss the upcoming project.
writing_note: 形容穿著、會議或語言風格輕鬆且不拘泥於禮節。

chinese: 提供資訊的；增長見聞的
example: The documentary was very informative and taught me a lot about marine life.
writing_note: 讚美書籍、演講或影片內容充實且有教育意義。

example: Better infrastructure, such as roads and power, is needed for economic growth.
writing_note: 描述交通、電力、通訊等支撐社會運作的基本設施。

chinese: 心靈手巧的；精巧的；有獨創性的
example: The architect came up with an ingenious solution to the problem of limited space.
writing_note: 稱讚設計、解決方案或人非常聰明且具備創意。

example: Hard work and persistence are the key ingredients for achieving long-term success.
writing_note: 除了烹飪食材，常用於比喻「構成某種結果的要素」。

example: Many rare and beautiful species of birds inhabit this tropical rainforest.
writing_note: 描述人或動物「居住、生活」在特定的環境中。

chinese: 內在的；固有的；與生俱來的
example: There are inherent risks in any new business venture, no matter how well planned.
writing_note: 15 級分作文常用來討論本質。描述某種特質是「原本就存在、無法分離」的。

example: He inherited a large fortune from his grandfather and decided to start a charity.
writing_note: 描述繼承遺產，或從父母那裡獲得遺傳基因、特徵。

example: High interest rates can inhibit economic growth by reducing consumer spending.
writing_note: 科學或心理用語。指阻止或降低某種活動的發生頻率。

example: Our initial reaction to the news was shock, but later we felt more optimistic.
writing_note: 描述事情最開端的狀態。副詞形 Initially (起初)。

example: The government has decided to initiate a new program to help the unemployed.
writing_note: 比 start 正式得多。描述發起一個具備規模或影響力的計畫。

example: In today"s competitive job market, you need to show initiative and work hard.
writing_note: 常用片語：Take the initiative (採取主動)。也指政府推動的新方案。

example: Many young people are passionate about fighting against social injustice and bias.
writing_note: 討論歧視、貧富差距或權益受損時的核心詞彙。

example: She has an innate ability to connect with people and make them feel welcome.
writing_note: 描述「打從出生就具備」的才能或本質。

example: He was eventually proven innocent after new evidence was found in the case.
writing_note: 法律上指沒犯罪，也形容小孩子心思單純、不世俗。

example: Technology companies rely on constant innovation to stay ahead of their competitors.
writing_note: 描述引進新方法、新技術來改變現狀的過程。

example: The school is famous for its innovative teaching methods and creative curriculum.
writing_note: 稱讚設計或思維具有前瞻性與原創性。

example: The government has launched an official inquiry into the causes of the accident.
writing_note: 指正式的詢問資訊或對某事件進行的深入調查。

example: The book provides a fascinating insight into the daily lives of ancient people.
writing_note: 常用結構：Insight into...。描述看透事物本質的能力或提供的深刻解析。

example: The difference in price between the two models was completely insignificant.
writing_note: 描述數量、影響力極小，完全不值得考慮。

example: His insincere apology only served to make the situation worse and hurt her feelings.
writing_note: 描述話語或態度並非發自內心，帶有「演戲、討好」的意味。

example: Are you trying to insinuate that I am responsible for the mistake?
writing_note: 通常指「負面、惡意的暗諷」。

example: My parents insist that I finish all my homework before I can go out with my friends.
writing_note: 常用結構：Insist on + V-ing 或 Insist that... (注意子句有時用虛擬語氣)。

example: The safety officer arrived to inspect the construction site and ensure all rules were followed.
writing_note: 描述正式且細緻的檢查，以確保符合標準。

chinese: 靈感；啟發；鼓舞人心的人事物
example: The beautiful scenery of the mountains provided the inspiration for his latest painting.
writing_note: 常用於創作領域或描述激勵人心的人物（You are an inspiration to us all）。

example: The teacher worked hard to inspire her students to pursue their dreams with confidence.
writing_note: 常用結構：Inspire someone to + V。注意其形容詞 Inspiring。

example: We decided to install a new security system to protect the building from theft.
writing_note: 描述安裝設備、軟體或使某人就職。

example: In most instances, a simple apology is enough to resolve a minor misunderstanding.
writing_note: 常用片語：For instance (例如)。

example: Mother animals have a powerful instinct to protect their young from any potential danger.
writing_note: 描述與生俱來的衝動或無須思考的直覺（by instinct）。

example: The research institute focuses on finding new ways to use renewable energy resources.
writing_note: 名詞指專業機構；動詞指「開始執行」新的規定或法律。

example: Marriage is a social institution that has existed in various forms for thousands of years.
writing_note: 指社會、教育或金融的「體制」或大型組織。

example: The manager instructed the team to finish the report before the end of the day.
writing_note: 帶有權威性的「教導」或正式的「命令」。

example: Please read the instructions carefully before you attempt to assemble the new furniture.
writing_note: 描述教導的過程，或指「產品說明書（複數 instructions）」。

chinese: 有教育意義的；增長見聞的
example: The field trip to the science museum was both fun and highly instructive for the students.
writing_note: 稱讚某項經歷或資料能讓人學到東西。

chinese: 樂器；儀器；工具；法律文件
example: The surgeon used several specialized instruments during the complex operation.
writing_note: 描述精密儀器（scientific instrument）或樂器（musical instrument）。

example: There was insufficient evidence to prove that the suspect was guilty of the crime.
writing_note: 常用於描述資金、證據或時間「未達標」。

chinese: 使絕緣；隔熱；使隔絕（以防負面影響）
example: The house is well insulated, which helps to keep it warm during the cold winter months.
writing_note: 物理上的隔絕（音/熱/電），或指保護某人不受外界干擾。

example: It is never acceptable to insult someone because of their background or beliefs.
writing_note: 描述冒犯性的言行。注意動詞與名詞的重音位置不同。

example: Amazingly, the ancient vase remained intact after falling off the shelf.
writing_note: 形容經歷災難或漫長時間後，依然「毫髮無傷、結構完整」。

chinese: 攝取（量）；入學（或入職）人數
example: Reducing your sugar intake can lead to a significant improvement in your overall health.
writing_note: 常用於討論健康與飲食（daily calorie intake）。

chinese: 無形的；觸摸不到的；難以捉摸的
example: Cultural heritage includes both tangible buildings and intangible traditions and music.
writing_note: 常用於描述「無形資產」或難以用語言描述的感覺。

example: The new software was designed to integrate smoothly with the existing system.
writing_note: 描述使不同部分結合成一體，或移民融入新文化。

example: A person of integrity will always do the right thing, even when no one is watching.
writing_note: 形容人格的高潔，或建築、數據的穩固完整。

chinese: 智力的；理性的；知識分子
example: Chess is a game that requires a lot of intellectual effort and strategic thinking.
writing_note: 描述腦力活動（intellectual property 智慧財產權）。

example: The military collected secret intelligence about the enemy"s plans and movements.
writing_note: 除了天生的聰明，也指間諜或政府蒐集的「情資」。

example: Humans are not the only intelligent beings on Earth; many animals show great problem-solving skills.
writing_note: 描述具備理解力、思考力。注意與 Artificial Intelligence (AI) 的關聯。

example: I didn"t intend to hurt your feelings; it was just a simple misunderstanding.
writing_note: 常用結構：Intend to + V。描述內心的計畫與目的。

example: The heat from the desert sun was so intense that it was difficult to breathe.
writing_note: 描述光、熱、情感或競爭「程度極高」。

example: The athletes trained with great intensity as the national competition approached.
writing_note: 描述力量或情感的強弱等級。

example: The student took an intensive English course to prepare for her study abroad program.
writing_note: 描述在短時間內投入大量精力的（intensive training 密集訓練）。

chinese: 意圖；目的；專心的；急切的
example: The police believe that the suspect had every intent to commit the crime.
writing_note: 常用於法律用語指「犯罪動機」。形容詞指目光專注的樣子。

example: The museum features several exhibits that allow visitors to interact with the displays.
